Package uk.ac.leedsbeckett.oop

Class LayoutLoader.LayoutData

java.lang.Object
uk.ac.leedsbeckett.oop.LayoutLoader.LayoutData
Enclosing class:
LayoutLoader
public static class LayoutLoader.LayoutData extends Object
Container class to hold parsed layout data.

  • Constructor Details

    • LayoutData

      public LayoutData(int width, int height, List<Position> path, List<Position> additionalTracks, List<Position> crossings, Position startPosition, Orientation startOrientation)
      Creates a new LayoutData container.
      Parameters:
      width - grid width
      height - grid height
      path - main path positions
      additionalTracks - additional track positions
      crossings - crossing positions
      startPosition - starting position
      startOrientation - starting orientation

  • Method Details

    • getWidth

      public int getWidth()
      Gets the width of the grid.
      Returns:
      grid width

    • getHeight

      public int getHeight()
      Gets the height of the grid.
      Returns:
      grid height

    • getPath

      public List<Position> getPath()
      Gets the main path positions.
      Returns:
      list of path positions

    • getAdditionalTracks

      public List<Position> getAdditionalTracks()
      Gets the additional track positions (not part of main path).
      Returns:
      list of additional track positions

    • getCrossings

      public List<Position> getCrossings()
      Gets the crossing positions.
      Returns:
      list of crossing positions

    • getStartPosition

      public Position getStartPosition()
      Gets the starting position for vehicles.
      Returns:
      starting position

    • getStartOrientation

      public Orientation getStartOrientation()
      Gets the starting orientation for vehicles.
